Tracerouter

Status: Completed  •  Finished: December 2, 2025  •  #game_development  


A fast, momentum-paced 3D parkour game set in a digital world being corrupted by a virus.

Engine: Godot
Team Size: 2
Time: 1 month
Role: Programmer, Composer

Haroon Amanullah

haroon.a.amanullah@gmail.com

Hi! I'm Haroon, a MechE student at the University of Maryland with a few too many creative outlets. Thanks for checking out my site :)
